motivos: ✓ Tu stack: React, Node.js, Full Stack, Front End, Back End, MongoDB
empleos.descripcion: Remote (exclusively from Argentina) We seek a talented Full-Stack Developer with expertise in backend development using Node.js and/or Python and frontend development using React. This is a remote position open to candidates, exclusively located in Argentina. The ideal candidate is proficient in English, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and is eager to work on innovative technology solutions. Key Responsibilities: Backend Development: Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services and APIs using Node.js (Express framework) and/or Python (Django, Flask, FastAPI). Frontend Development: Build responsive and dynamic user interfaces using React.js, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Integration: Ensure seamless integration of front-end and back-end components. API Management: Implement RESTful APIs and manage third-party API integrations. Performance Optimization: Optimize applications for performance, scalability, and security. Code Quality: Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code, conduct code reviews, and ensure adherence to best practices. Collaboration: Work with cross-functional teams in an Agile environment to define, design, and ship new features. DevOps: For deployment and management, utilize tools like Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, and CI/CD pipelines (GitLab). Testing: Develop and execute tests using Cypress, Mocha, Chai, or Jest. Required Skills And Qualifications: Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer with strong backend skills in Node.js and/or Python. Proficiency in React.js and front-end technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript). Experience with AWS, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, and cloud infrastructure. Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, and GitLab CI/CD pipelines. Strong understanding of RESTful APIs, WebSockets, and microservices architecture. Excellent p

motivos: ✓ Tu stack: Full Stack, React, TypeScript, Node.js, SQL, JavaScript
empleos.descripcion: Mindrift is looking for skilled Full-Stack Web App Developers (JavaScript/TypeScript + Python or Node) to join the Tendem project (https://tendem.ai/) and build interactive browser-based applications within our hybrid AI + human environment. In this role, as an AI Pilot - that's how we refer to this position at Mindrift - you'll collaborate with Tendem Agents that handle repetitive tasks, while you provide full-stack engineering expertise, architectural judgment, and quality control to ensure web apps are functional, robust, and ready for real users. This part-time remote opportunity is ideal for professionals with hands-on experience in modern frontend frameworks, backend APIs, databases, and shipping interactive web products end-to-end. What We Do The Mindrift platform connects specialists with AI projects from major tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the potential of Generative AI by tapping into real-world expertise from across the globe. About The Role This is a freelance role for a Tendem project. As a Full-Stack Web App Developer, you'll design, build, and refine browser-based applications with real logic, state, persistence, and user input — from habit trackers and budgeting tools to internal dashboards, mini-SaaS tools, and AI-powered apps. You may also work on standalone Python applications and data-processing scripts that sit alongside or behind these products. Key Responsibilities Build interactive web applications with frontend (React, Next.js, Vue, or similar) and a backend API (Python/FastAPI/Flask or Node/Express) Design and implement data models, schemas, and persistence layers using SQL (PostgreSQL, SQLite) or NoSQL stores Implement authentication, sessions, and basic role-based access where needed Integrate third-party APIs and AI/LLM services

motivos: ✓ Tu stack: React, Full Stack, Front End, TypeScript, JavaScript, Back End

Develop and maintain scalable front-end applications with a strong focus on performance and user experience. Collaborate closely with Product, UX/UI Designers, and Back-end Engineers to deliver high-quality features. Comfortable working with AI-powered tools to enhance productivity, optimize workflows, and support day-to-day development tasks (e.g. code assistance, debugging, documentation, or research). Advanced proficiency in English (both written and spoken). Nice to Have Experience collaborating closely with UX/UI design teams. Familiarity with component libraries and design systems. Experience with unit testing and front-end testing frameworks. Passion for creating exceptional user experiences and continuously improving existing applications. What We Offer Referral bonus Tuition Reimbursement English lessons

empleos.descripcion: Company Description Talan – Positive Innovation Talan is an international consulting group specializing in innovation and business transformation through technology. With over 7,200 consultants in 21 countries and a turnover of €850M, we are committed to delivering impactful, future-ready solutions. Talan at a Glance Headquartered in Paris and operating globally, Talan combines technology, innovation, and empowerment to deliver measurable results for our clients. Over the past 22 years, we’ve built a strong presence in the IT and consulting landscape, and we’re on track to reach €1 billion in revenue this year. Our Core Areas of Expertise Data & Technologies: We design and implement large-scale, end-to-end architecture and data solutions, including data integration, data science, visualization, Big Data, AI, and Generative AI. Cloud & Application Services: We integrate leading platforms such as SAP, Salesforce, Oracle, Microsoft, AWS, and IBM Maximo, helping clients transition to the cloud and improve operational efficiency. Management & Innovation Consulting: We lead business and digital transformation initiatives through project and change management best practices (PM, PMO, Agile, Scrum, Product Ownership), and support domains such as Supply Chain, Cybersecurity, and ESG/Low-Carbon strategies. We work with major global clients across diverse sectors, including Transport & Logistics, Financial Services, Energy & Utilities, Retail, and Media & Telecommunications. empleos.titulo: Software Engineer Full Stack & AI First
empleos.descripcion: En Homie estamos transformando la forma en que las personas rentan vivienda en LATAM. No somos un portal de anuncios: administramos la renta de principio a fin en representación de los propietarios desde la captación y las visitas hasta el contrato, la gestión de la renta y la dispersión a los dueños. Después de casi diez años operando, estamos modernizando y reconstruyendo el núcleo de nuestra tecnología sobre bases AI-first: sistemas simples, bien probados y altamente apalancados en IA, capaces de operar todo el ciclo de renta con velocidad y calidad. Buscamos a alguien que construya con criterio: que use la IA como multiplicador real no como autocompletado, que sepa exactamente qué no construir y que se obsesione con la simplicidad, la calidad y los datos limpios. Si te emociona resolver problemas de negocio reales con apalancamiento de IA y tener impacto directo en un producto que mueve el mercado, queremos conocerte. Misión del rol Diseñar y construir con alto apalancamiento de IA, un núcleo de software simple, robusto y bien probado que habilite una mejor experiencia para propietarios, inquilinos y equipos internos, y que pueda evolucionar rápido sin acumular complejidad ni deuda. Tu trabajo no es solo escribir código: es construir los sistemas, las barreras de calidad y la observabilidad que permiten al equipo y a la IA entregar rápido y con confianza. Elevas el estándar técnico, mantienes los datos como activo central del negocio y aseguras que todo lo que sale a producción esté probado, sea reproducible y aporte valor real. Tareas Construir de punta a punta (full-stack), diseñas e implementas funcionalidades completas del ciclo de renta de la base de datos a la interfaz, con ownership end-to-end y comodidad para moverte por todo el stack. About us At HelpBnk, we donât just build software; we build infrastructure for a future where everyone has the agency to follow their dreams. Co-founded by Simon Squibb, we are on a mission to Free Humanity from the trap of unfulfilling work and the looming challenges of AI-driven automation. We are a high-growth startup under the Dream Inc umbrella, creating a social platform and business-starting tools that empower people to take control of their lives. If you are tired of "just a job" and want to fight for something that matters, read on. Our Culture Ownership. We're small, so there's a lot of open ground. If you spot something broken, you're the one who gets to fix it. That's the good part and the hard part. Openness. Problems get named early, including our own. We'd rather have an uncomfortable conversation on Monday than a bad quarter. AI as a tool . We build with agentic AI (Claude Code, Cursor, and whatever comes next). We're not looking for people who let it write the code unsupervised, or for people who won't touch it. We're looking for people who've worked out where it helps and where it lies to you. Interesting problems . The work here is genuinely unsolved in places. If you like that, you'll like it here. If you'd rather have a well-defined roadmap and a clear spec, we're probably not the right fit for eachother. The Challenge We are in a pivotal phase of our journey. HelpBnk is transitioning its mobile experience from a web to a full native React Native application. Simultaneously, we are revamping our UX. As a Senior Engineer, you will have a massive impact on the future of our mobile development as we expand into new countries and verticals. What Youâll Do Lead the Transition: Architect and build high-performance, scalable mobile applications from th

empleos.descripcion: 🚀 Sobre Nosotros Estamos creando la nueva era comunicacional de la hotelería. Y queremos que seas parte. Somos WeSpeak, una startup que está re-inventando la venta hotelera con asistentes virtuales de Inteligencia Artificial para WhatsApp. Nuestra tecnología de inteligencia artificial conversa con huéspedes en tiempo real y transforma la forma en que los hoteles se comunican con sus clientes y venden de forma directa para depender menos de plataformas como Booking.com. Ya ayudamos a más de 500 hoteles en 20 países a convertir más consultas en reservas, 24/7, con el tono humano que la hospitalidad merece. Crecemos porque amamos lo que hacemos, somos profesionales y tenemos un foco absoluto y tenemos un equipo brutal. Si buscas estabilidad o comodidad, este puesto no sea para vos. Pero si queres crecer como profesional, desafiarte y aprender a ejecutar a velocidad startup, este es tu lugar. 🟣 ¿Por qué es importante este rol? En WeSpeak estamos en una etapa de evolución técnica donde la velocidad es importante, pero la arquitectura correcta es crítica. Buscamos un/a Software Engineer (Senior / Semi-Senior) con fuerte dominio del ecosistema moderno de JavaScript, que no solo desarrolle funcionalidades, sino que participe activamente en decisiones de arquitectura, diseño de sistemas y escalabilidad del producto. Este rol es clave para: Diseñar soluciones sólidas y mantenibles. Tomar decisiones técnicas con visión de largo plazo. Elevar el estándar de ingeniería del equipo. Construir una base tecnológica escalable. Es un perfil con mentalidad de ingeniería, no solo de ejecución. 🟣 Responsabilidades principales Pilar 1: Arquitectura y diseño de soluciones Este pilar responde a: asegurar que lo que construimos hoy siga funcionando mañana. Diseñar arquitectura de nuevas funciona

empleos.descripcion: Mindrift is looking for skilled Frontend Developers (HTML/CSS/JavaScript, React/Next.js) to join the Tendem project (https://tendem.ai/) and build high-quality landing pages and multi-page websites within our hybrid AI + human environment. In this role, as an AI Pilot - that's how we refer to this position at Mindrift - you'll collaborate with Tendem Agents that handle repetitive tasks, while you provide frontend craftsmanship, design sensibility, and quality control to ensure pixel-perfect, conversion-ready websites that match real client briefs. This part-time remote opportunity is ideal for professionals with hands-on experience in landing page production, multi-page website development, and modern frontend frameworks. What We Do The Mindrift platform connects specialists with AI projects from major tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the potential of Generative AI by tapping into real-world expertise from across the globe. About The Role This is a freelance role for a Tendem project. As a Frontend Developer, you'll design, build, and refine landing pages, waitlist pages, promo pages, and small multi-page sites (portfolios, restaurant sites, small business sites, simple online stores), turning client briefs into responsive, performant, polished web experiences. Key Responsibilities Build landing pages, waitlist pages, and promo pages with clear hero sections, CTAs, and conversion-focused layouts Build small multi-page websites (Home, About, Services, Contact, etc.) that follow client requirements and basic information architecture Implement responsive, mobile-first layouts that work cleanly across devices and browsers Integrate forms, email capture, basic analytics, and simple CMS or headless content sources Apply on-page SEO basics (semantic HTML, meta tags, p

empleos.descripcion: Building the Future of Open Finance Payward - the parent company behind Kraken, NinjaTrader, Breakout, xStocks, Payward Services and CF Benchmarks - has spent the last 15 years building one of the most modern and globally accessible financial infrastructure platforms in the industry, built to advance an open, global financial system. Before you apply, we encourage you to explore our culture page to understand what drives us and how we work. The Team We are currently seeking an experienced Senior Software Engineer to join our growing Payments & Blockchain team to be focused on our payments systems. The Payments & Blockchain team is responsible for the first and last mile of every dollar (digital or fiat) that goes in or out of Kraken. Join our Payments team to help integrate Kraken’s systems with an ever-expanding universe of payment providers. As a member of this team, your focus is on protecting client funds. You will be responsible for building systems that communicate with various blockchains to enable the timely processing of client transactions, while also ensuring the safety and security of all funds on the exchange. The Opportunity Design, develop, and maintain high-quality payment processing systems using React.js and other relevant technologies Build and refine seamless transaction experiences that optimize fund transfers for speed, security, and reliability Ensure an efficient and intuitive onboarding experience for users interacting with payment systems, reducing friction and improving trust Develop innovative features that enhance engagement, retention, and loyalty within the payments ecosystem Set the standard for high-quality, secure code and lead the development of complex financial software systems Influence technical decisions, contribute to strategy di

empleos.descripcion: I’m helping NCUBE find a top candidate to join their team full-time for the role of Backend Engineer. You will scale AI fashion technology by building robust infrastructure for global retail brands. Compensation: Provide your expected compensation while applying Location: Remote (for Brazil, Argentina, Mexico, Chile, Peru, Venezuela, Colombia, Costa Rica, and Ecuador residents) Mission of NCUBE: "Our mission is to help ambitious companies scale with world-class developers—building high-performing teams that deliver real impact, without the chaos." What makes you a strong candidate: You have +5 years experience in TypeScript, Python, Node.js, FastAPI. You are proficient in Webhook, Schema design, SQS, Query optimization, PostgreSQL. English - Conversational. Responsibilities and more: Company Overview: - We are looking for a Backend Engineer to join the technical team of a San Francisco-based AI fashion-tech company that builds photorealistic AI virtual try-on, AI sizing prediction, and personalized outfit-recommendation technology, sold B2B to fashion and retail brands. - We build the integration and infrastructure layer that connects the platform to the systems our brand partners already use, including major CRM, marketplace, and e-commerce platforms. - Your work will directly determine how easily fashion and retail brands can adopt AI-powered try-on and recommendation experiences at scale. - You will build the reliable, well-designed APIs and services that make ML models usable in the real world. Required Experience and Skills: - 5 years of production experience with Python (FastAPI) and/or Node.js/TypeScript. - Strong grasp of REST API design, third-party integration patterns, OAuth, and webhooks. - Hands-on PostgreSQL experience, including schema design and query op

Web Developer (WordPress & CRO Focus) Project-Based | Remote | Flexible Schedule About Talent Global Talent Global connects exceptional remote professionals with fast-growing international companies. We specialize in helping businesses build high-performing teams across marketing, operations, creative, and technology. We're looking for a Web Developer to redesign and optimize our company website, creating a more modern, professional, and conversion-focused experience that supports our business growth. About the Role This is a project-based opportunity for an experienced Web Developer who can take ownership of redesigning and improving our website from both a technical and user experience perspective. We're looking for someone who understands not only website development, but also how to build pages that convert visitors into qualified leads. You'll be responsible for redesigning and modernizing the Talent Global website to create a more professional, engaging, and conversion-focused experience. This includes improving the overall user journey, showcasing our services, open positions, and client testimonials more effectively, while optimizing the site to increase qualified leads and achieve a target conversion rate of 30% of visitors clicking to book a call. empleos.descripcion: Job Title: AI Software Developer Location: Remote (LATAM) Type: Full-Time | Remote Language: Professional English (C1 and C2 scores) WorkBetterNow (www.workbetternow.com) connects full-time remote professionals living in LATAM who are looking to work with US-based companies. Our professionals come first and are the most important part of our team. As we continue to grow, we are expanding our team. If you want to be part of a company that values work-life balance and supports your professional development, you're in the right place. Our Core Values Put our Talent first Pursuit of excellence/continuous learning Integrity and transparency Ownership mentality Pursuit of growth Excellent attitude Job Description: The AI Software Developer designs, builds, and ships internal applications that streamline operations, reduce software licensing costs, and scale with business growth. Using AI-assisted development tools (Replit, Claude Code, Copilot), you'll rapidly prototype and deliver production-ready tools that replace selected third-party software and manual workflows. This role combines hands-on engineering with a product mindset, turning business problems into working software quickly, securely, and cost-effectively. Key Responsibilities Build, ship, and maintain internal web applications using AI-assisted development environments, translating business requirements into working software quickly while maintaining reliability and security standards Partner with leadership to identify high-cost or underused software that can be replaced with purpose-built internal tools, and estimate cost savings delivered by each replacement project Write clean, documented, and maintainable code following source control and deployment best practices; apply security and data protection standard

We are currently hiring for a full-time remote position open exclusively to candidates based in the United States. This is a stable work-from-home opportunity within a professional, structured, and supportive team environment. Position Type: Full-Time (Remote) Location: United States only Pay Rate: $28 per hour No prior experience is required. Paid training will be provided. We are looking for dependable individuals with a positive attitude, strong work ethic, and a willingness to learn. Requirements Must be legally authorized to work in the United States. Must have access to a reliable computer or laptop. Must have a stable and reliable internet connection. Basic computer skills are required, including typing, email usage, and file management. Strong attention to detail and accuracy. Good written and verbal communication skills. Ability to work independently with minimal supervision. Must have a quiet and distraction-free workspace. Follow written instructions, company guidelines, and internal procedures carefully. Communicate professionally with internal teams or external contacts when necessary. Manage time effectively while working independently in a remote environment. Maintain confidentiality, data security, and data integrity at all times. Participate in training sessions, onboarding activities, or team meetings as required. Adapt to new tools, software, and processes as the role evolves. What We Offer Competitive pay at $28 per hour for full-time work. 100 percent remote work environment. Paid training and onboarding provided. Consistent full-time work schedule. Opportunities for growth and advancement

Job Title: Frontend Software Engineer Job Type: Contractor Location: Remote Job Summary Frontend Software Engineers to participate in a high-impact customer project, focusing on crafting exceptional user interfaces. In this role, you'll apply your expertise to help train next-generation AI systems. Your work will shape how models learn, reason, and perform through high-quality, real-world input. No prior experience in AI is required — your domain knowledge is what matters. Leverage your ability to interpret detailed component style guides and screenshots, delivering pixel-accurate, responsive web interfaces that set new standards in usability and aesthetics. Strong communication skills are highly valued for effective collaboration and documentation. Scope of Work Interpret and translate component style guides and interface screenshots into precise, visually consistent UI deliverables. Implement pixel-perfect, responsive web components using modern technologies such as Typescript and CSS3. Ensure all UI elements adhere to established design systems and accessibility standards. Collaborate asynchronously through clear documentation and constructive feedback within a remote-first environment. Proactively identify, communicate, and resolve inconsistencies or ambiguities in design specifications. Optimize UI performance across devices, focusing on fast load times and smooth interactions. Contribute domain-specific expertise to guide the training and development of advanced AI models. Preferred Qualifications Minimum of 3 years of professional experience delivering high-quality front-end solutions. Proven proficiency with Typescript, CSS3, and responsive web design principles. Demonstrated success in building pixel-perfect interfaces from detailed visual references. Experienc

Next.js Developer 📍 Remote (Argentina-based candidates only) 🗣 Fluent English Required 📅 Minimum 4 years of experience Company Overview CodingIT is a fast-growing software development company delivering scalable, high-quality digital solutions for clients in the U.S. market. We work on complex, real-world products where strong engineering practices, ownership, and technical excellence matter. As part of our growth, we offer a clearly defined career path that allows experienced engineers to progressively take on greater technical ownership and leadership responsibilities, including opportunities to evolve into Tech Lead roles over time. Role Overview As a Next.js Developer at CodingIT, you will own the development and continuous improvement of high-performing websites and digital experiences built primarily with Next.js and TypeScript. The role combines hands-on engineering with close collaboration with marketing, design, and business stakeholders. You will work independently alongside the Marketing team or under the supervision of a Digital Experience Manager. We are looking for a self-sufficient, proactive, and dynamic developer who can translate business and marketing needs into reliable technical solutions, manage priorities with limited supervision, and take ownership from implementation through deployment and monitoring. Experience building and maintaining e-commerce websites and working with CMS platforms such as Webflow or WordPress is essential. Key Responsibilities Develop, maintain, and continuously improve websites and digital experiences using Next.js and TypeScript. Apply modern Next.js patterns, including the App Router, server and client components, data fetching, caching, and appropriate rendering strategies. Build reusable, responsive, and accessible us
